title: The Ebon Spire
summary: Varth has promised a bigger payday at Vel Shara in the Unknown Regions. To get there, the crew needs ancient hyperspace charts. Denia points them to the Ebon Spire — Revan's forward base on the Forest Moon of Endor — where Jedi holocrons with navigational data should be stored. But the Dead Forest is strong with the Dark Side, and the Spire's defenses don't care that the war ended millennia ago.

gearNotes.reason: The Dead Forest has toxic spore clouds from the petrified vegetation. Without respiratory protection, characters take environmental penalties during the trek.
The Ebon Spire's interior is pitch black. Ancient lighting systems failed centuries ago. Without light sources, all checks inside the Spire are upgraded in difficulty.
The Descent into the Spire involves vertical shafts and collapsed stairways. Without rope, certain routes are impassable.
The Brood Mother fight and Dark Echoes gauntlet both deal wounds. No medical facilities on the Forest Moon.
Scouting the Dead Forest perimeter and locating the Spire entrance from distance. The Ewoks can point you in the right direction, but the canopy is dense.
Imperial probe droids patrol the Endor system. Avoiding detection on approach keeps the crew off Draco's radar.
The Dark Echoes psychological gauntlet can inflict strain. Stim packs help recover between encounters in the Spire.
Extended wilderness trek through the Forest Moon. Navigation, shelter, and foraging between the Ewok village and the Dead Forest.
